look.text: Twenty feet of tarred line, still supple.

combine.text: You lash the boathook to the line. A serviceable grapple.

look.text: A long-shafted boathook. Good steel under the flaking paint.
Boathook, line, and a fisherman's knot. It should drag the bottom.
The fresnel lens, dripping and whole. Heavier than it looks.
